notes:
To enter the product key, game language needs to get changed to 'English' first. Same issue exists under Windows, too.
See https://steamcommunity.com/app/322130/discussions/0/627456359653566382/

After one entered the product key, language can be changed again.
But, the game does not launch at all using Proton. Wine-4.0 works fine though, I can start it via:

WINEPREFIX=$HOME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/322130/pfx/ wine $HOME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/Disney\'s\ Princess\ Enchanted\ Journey/play.exe
title: Disney Princess: Enchanted Journey
